race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before Cheltenham Dragonboosts Novices' Limited Handicap Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed harbour light at position 2 (22.0% probability) vs top pick Ballyhiho (32.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~10.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Ballyhiho > Harbour Light, but actual result was Harbour Light > Eaststone Buck's. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Harbour Light had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -3.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
